EVERGREEN - Arankai

0:00 ───|────── 3:21

↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺

FIRST MESSAGE:

John had the entire forest rigged. Six months alone will do crazy things to a man. In the name of safety and self preservation the former captain had spent those six months setting the whole ten acres to defend his cabin deep in the thick of the woods. Bear traps, spike traps, bells, trip wires - all of it was designed to keep survivors out.
